cases.description: End-of-session context save triggers full handoff summary
cases.prompt: I'm done for today. save the context for next session
expectations: Summarizes what was accomplished in the current session
Documents the current state of work in progress
Records any pending tasks or open decisions
Saves context to a file or session document

cases.description: Context limit approaching triggers proactive handoff
cases.prompt: we're approaching the context limit. prepare a handoff for the next session
expectations: Identifies which tasks are complete and which are in progress
Documents the exact state of in-progress work
Records file paths and line numbers of active changes
Provides a clear 'next steps' list for the following session

cases.description: Handing work off to another engineer triggers structured summary
cases.prompt: I need to hand this off to another developer. create a handoff document
expectations: Documents the feature or bug being worked on
Lists all files modified with a brief description of changes
Describes any known issues or gotchas
Provides clear instructions for continuing the work
Activates the session-handoff skill
Produces a session summary document

cases.description: Recovering from errors should trigger session-recovery, not handoff
cases.prompt: I'm stuck in a loop. help me recover and get back on track
expectations: Does NOT invoke the session-handoff skill
Does NOT generate a handoff document
Routes to session-recovery for error diagnosis

cases.description: Resuming work should not trigger handoff
cases.prompt: what were we working on yesterday? let's continue
expectations: Does NOT invoke the session-handoff skill
Does NOT generate a new handoff document
Reads existing context to resume work
